value: Morning! Thanks for reaching out. We appreciate your interest in supporting charity events. I don't have details on our current donation or sponsorship programs for charity races readily available, but this is definitely something worth exploring with our team. Could you let me know a bit more about the event you're organizing—such as the date, location, and the type of support you're looking for—and I'll get you connected with the right person who can discuss what we might be able to do to help?
